blockingIssues.description: register_market accepts caller-provided quote_decimals and only range-checks it (1..18) without validating against quote asset metadata decimals, allowing mismatched market metadata and incorrect client-side price encoding.

Default deploy-testnet-full seeding uses REFERENCE_PRICE=0.0001 with PRICE_SCALE rounding, collapsing intended ladder levels into duplicate prices; recorded output shows only 2 bid levels and 1 ask level instead of the expected 10/10 depth.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update .factory/skills/move-worker/SKILL.md to remove fixed 6-decimal quote assumptions and add explicit guidance for validating quote_decimals against on-chain asset metadata.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of contract-decimal-flexibility flagged stale guidance in move-worker skill (fixed USDC=6 assumptions) and handoff feedback requested this update.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Extend backend-worker (or add a deployment-focused variant) with Aptos testnet deployment runbook steps, seeding verification criteria, and required explorer evidence capture.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of testnet-deploy-and-seed and worker handoff feedback showed current backend-worker guidance is API/SDK-focused and underspecified for deployment-heavy tasks.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document in library that UserBalances.usdc is currently the generic quote bucket and remains USDC-scaled in SDK internals.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected for now: this should be resolved in code (non-blocking review issue) rather than codified as durable guidance before the quote-balance model is corrected.
